metadata.description: Gazes at the repository, freezes its current structure into an immutable snapshot, and surfaces hotspots, cycles, and complexity by structural rank.

plugins.name: full
plugins.description: Meta-plugin. One install pulls in all six Gorgon sub-plugins via dependency resolution.

plugins.name: gorgon-gaze
plugins.description: Captures the initial codebase snapshot on SessionStart; refreshes on UserPromptSubmit focus shifts. Runs G1 Tarjan SCC + G3 PageRank.

plugins.name: gorgon-watcher
plugins.description: Per-edit incremental AST refresh; updates G1 adjacency and recomputes G2 cyclomatic on changed functions.

plugins.name: gorgon-hotspots
plugins.description: Top-N hotspot ranking with bootstrap 95% CI. Reads state/snapshot.json.

plugins.name: gorgon-deps
plugins.description: 1-hop / 2-hop dependency neighbourhood query for a file (imports and importers).

plugins.name: gorgon-learning
plugins.description: PreCompact hook persists hotspot-drift signature posterior via G5 Gauss Accumulation.
